heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds, with hit-or-miss showers and thunderstorms. Warm and humid. Lows in the 60s to near 70. West to northwest wind near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Periods of clouds, with a few localized showers diminishing north to south. Chance of an isolated thunderstorm, mainly south of Rt. 4. Highs in the 80s. Light wind becoming west to northwest near 10 mph.

heading: Independence Day
text: Periods of clouds, with a few localized showers diminishing north to south. Chance of an isolated thunderstorm, mainly south of Rt. 4. Highs in the 80s. Light wind becoming west to northwest near 10 mph.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly clear and less humid. Chance of a stray evening shower south. Lows in the 50s to low 60s. Calm wind.
